personas.name: Carlos Mendez
personas.personality: Professional, detail-oriented, time-pressured. Manages multiple product lines.
personas.language_style: Direct and technical. Uses product model numbers. Expects fast answers.
typical_pain_points: Warranty status unclear for fleet orders
Firmware update issues across multiple units

personas.name: Jake Thompson
personas.personality: Casual, non-technical. Frustrated when product doesn't work. Needs simple answers.
personas.language_style: Informal. Describes symptoms rather than technical issues. Uses plain language.

personas.name: Maria Santos
personas.personality: Highly technical, efficient. Installs products daily. Needs precise answers fast.
personas.language_style: Technical shorthand. Uses model numbers, part numbers, error codes.
typical_pain_points: Sonar module failure on new install
